name: chexi-trading
description: chexi-trading monorepo — Go API, admin UI, Docker local dev

scripts.web:dev: if [ -f apps/web/package.json ]; then pnpm --filter @chexi/web dev; else echo 'apps/web is not scaffolded yet.'; fi
scripts.web:build: if [ -f apps/web/package.json ]; then pnpm --filter @chexi/web build; else echo 'apps/web is not scaffolded yet.'; fi
scripts.web:lint: if [ -f apps/web/package.json ]; then pnpm --filter @chexi/web lint; else echo 'apps/web is not scaffolded yet.'; fi
